root_module_families.reason: Full-AI orchestration is the largest root module family and is scheduled for package migration.
Research-init modules should move into workflow, document, and source packages.
Evidence-selection modules are an existing root family retained until a dedicated package pass.
Source route compatibility modules remain at root until route package boundaries are introduced.
Document extraction modules are scheduled for research-init document packaging.
Source document modules are scheduled for source-handoff packaging.
Graph full-mode modules are scheduled for ai_full_mode package migration.
Entity embedding modules are an existing graph-service root family retained until packaging.

package_module_counts.reason: Evidence API routers are an existing package family; future route moves should ratchet this count down.
Graph routers are an existing package family; future route moves should ratchet this count down.
Graph API schema modules are an existing schema package family retained until schema subpackages are introduced.
